Lake Mary Restaurant Health Grades

86%Grade A
4.3Avg rating
28Restaurants

Lake Mary grades cleaner than most of Central Florida: 86% of the 28 restaurants we track here hold an A. DON JULIO MEXICAN KITCHEN AND TEQUILA BAR leads the list at 100/100. Below, every kitchen is sorted best grade first, so the safest bets rise to the top.

Lake Mary restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Lake Mary restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 28 Lake Mary restaurants we grade, 24 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Lake Mary restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Lake Mary?

We currently publish 28 graded restaurants in Lake Mary, with an average diner rating of 4.3 stars; 24 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
